title: Module 1
content:
Review of digital system
Binary decoder- decoder networks, encoders-priority encoder,
Multiplexers-multiplexer trees, demultiplexers, shifters —barrel
shifter. Implementation of combinational circuits using Multiplexers
and Decoders. Adder modules- ripple carry adder, carry look ahead
adder (CLA),Carry-Save Adder (CSA), Carry-Save Adder (CSA),
Comparator module.

title: Module 2
content:
Sequential network Design
General model for sequential network, State tables, State graphs,
Derivations of state graph. State reduction-equivalence classes and and
state assignment. Design examples using the FSM approach-serial
adder, modulo —p counter, pattern recognizer. 3pattern recognizer.

title: Module 3
content:
Timing characteristics and Hazards
Impediments to synchronous design- Clock skew,jitter, gating the
clock,Asynchronous
inputs, synchronizer
failure and
metastability.
Data  synchronizer.
Timing hazard-Static hazard, dynamic hazard, essential hazard and
designing hazard free circuits.

title: Module 4
content:
Introduction to digital design methodology using HDL and
Programmable devices.
Fundamentals-, basic language elements —data object, data types,
identifiers.
Process statement-signal assignment vs variable assignment .
Programmable Array Logic-combinational PLDs (Eg:PAL 12H6)
PLDs((Eg PAL12H6),
3
Sequential PLDs (Eg: PAL16R8), Simple PLD (Eg: PAL16R8)
Complex Programmable Logic Devices- Xilinx XC 9500 CPLD
family. 4
